title_cn: 泰国选举委员会 Election Commission 陷舆论漩涡，大选处理违规指控受关注
desc_original: Allegations of irregularities in the handling of the general election by the Election Commission (EC) have drawn widespread attention in the country’s unfolding constitutional debate.
summary_cn: 由于在处理大选过程中涉嫌违规，泰国选举委员会（EC）目前正面临来自社会各界的严厉审查。这些指控已成为泰国当前宪法辩论的核心议题。随着公众对选举公正性的质疑升温，该事件不仅影响政局稳定，更引发了对选举机构透明度和法治程序的广泛讨论。

title_cn: 泰国两名前议会成员被控严重违反职业道德，涉及赌博及土地纠纷
desc_original: The National Anti-Corruption Commission (NACC) has found two former MPs guilty of serious ethical breaches in separate gambling and land cases.
summary_cn: 泰国国家反腐败委员会（NACC）近日宣布，两名前国会议员在两起独立案件中被裁定违反严重道德准则。案件内容分别涉及非法赌博及违法土地交易。此裁决体现了泰国监管机构对政界人员道德操守的严格管控，相关人员或将面临进一步的法律惩治或从业限制。

title_cn: 警方将阿努廷 Prime Minister Anutin 家族“VIP跑道”案移交反贪委处理
desc_original: Police have completed their investigation into a “VIP runway” on land owned by the family of Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul in Nakhon Ratchasima and forwarded the case to the National Anti-Corruption Commission (NACC).
summary_cn: 泰国警方已完成对位于呵叻府（Nakhon Ratchasima）一段私人跑道的调查。该跑道位于总理阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）家族拥有的土地上，此前被质疑违规建设。目前警方已将案件侦办记录移交给国家反腐败委员会（NACC）进一步审理，该案件在泰国民间引发了关于特权与土地使用的热议。

title_cn: 美泰“哈努曼卫士”演习闭幕，美军向泰军转交17辆斯特瑞克 Stryker 装甲车
desc_original: LOPBURI — The United States Army Pacific (USARPAC) has ceremonially transferred 17 Stryker armoured vehicles to the Royal Thai Army during the closing ceremony of Exercise Hanuman Guardian 2026, marking a new step in bilateral defence cooperation.
summary_cn: 在华富里府（Lopburi）举行的“哈努曼卫士 2026”联合军事演习闭幕式上，美国太平洋陆军向泰国皇家陆军正式移交了17辆斯特瑞克（Stryker）轮式装甲车。此举标志着美泰双边国防合作的进一步深化，旨在提升泰国陆军的机动与防御能力。该系列演习是两国长期军事伙伴关系的重要组成部分。

title_cn: 泰国财政部拟推出税务优惠方案，鼓励大企业带动中小微企业 SME 升级
desc_original: The Finance Ministry is preparing tax reduction measures for large businesses that help bring small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) into their supply chains, in a bid to help upgrade local SMEs.
summary_cn: 泰国财政部正在筹划一项新的减税计划，重点针对将本地中小企业（SMEs）纳入其供应链的大型企业。此举旨在通过“大带小”模式，激励大型集团协助中小企业进行技术与管理升级，从而增强本土企业的竞争力和供应链韧性。这对在泰经营的中资供应链企业亦具有政策参考价值。

title: 泰国东部旅游目的地未受近期航班延误浪潮影响
desc: Tourism operators along Thailand's eastern coast say the region is largely insulated from the flight disruptions currently affecting southern destinations.
desc_original: Tourism operators along Thailand's eastern coast say the region is largely insulated from the flight disruptions currently affecting southern destinations.
title_cn: 泰国东部旅游区未受近期航班延误潮冲击
summary_cn: 泰国东部沿海地区的旅游运营商表示，该地区基本未受到近期影响其南部目的地（如普吉、苏梅等地）航班延误浪潮的冲击。虽然南部海岛目的地因航班编排和技术性问题面临不便，但以芭提雅（Pattaya）及罗勇府（Rayong）为首的东部旅游线依然运行平稳。这对于计划在热季前往泰国避暑的游客而言是一个稳健的替代选择。

title: Tourism meets culture
desc: A proposal to merge Thailand's culture and tourism portfolios to strengthen the country's cultural "soft power" could boost high-value tourism, but bureaucratic reform and greater private-sector involvement will be crucial for the strategy to succeed, according to a former tourism minister.
desc_original: A proposal to merge Thailand's culture and tourism portfolios to strengthen the country's cultural "soft power" could boost high-value tourism, but bureaucratic reform and greater private-sector involvement will be crucial for the strategy to succeed, according to a former tourism minister.
title_cn: 泰旅游部拟与文化部合并以强化“文化软实力”
summary_cn: 泰国前旅游部长建议，将泰国文化部与旅游体育部的职能合并，以此增强国家的文化“软实力”并推动高价值旅游业的发展。支持者认为此举能更有效地推广泰国本土文化，但专家提醒，行政体制改革和加强私营部门的整合深度，将是该战略能否取得实质性成功的关键。这对未来泰国旅游产品的文化转型具有深远指导意义。

title: Russian flair
desc: In honour of Her Royal Highness Princess Sirivannavari Nariratana Rajakanya and in tribute to her distinguished genius in arts and culture, the Ministry of Culture in collaboration with the Russian embassy and the Royal Bangkok Symphony Orchestra (RBSO) Foundation, supported by B.Grimm, recently presented a spectacular concert titled Russian Seasons at the Thailand Cultural Centre (TCC).
desc_original: In honour of Her Royal Highness Princess Sirivannavari Nariratana Rajakanya and in tribute to her distinguished genius in arts and culture, the Ministry of Culture in collaboration with the Russian embassy and the Royal Bangkok Symphony Orchestra (RBSO) Foundation, supported by B.Grimm, recently presented a spectacular concert titled Russian Seasons at the Thailand Cultural Centre (TCC).
title_cn: “俄罗斯风情”音乐盛典在曼谷泰国文化中心圆满举行
summary_cn: 为致敬希里婉瓦丽公主（Princess Sirivannavari）在文化艺术领域的卓越造诣，泰国文化部联合俄罗斯驻泰使馆、皇家曼谷交响乐团（RBSO）基金会在泰国文化中心（TCC）举办了名为“俄罗斯季 Russian Seasons”的盛大音乐会。此次活动由 B.Grimm 集团支持，展现了中俄泰文化交融的艺术魅力，也为曼谷的高端文化艺术生活增添了亮丽一笔。
location_detail: 泰国文化中心 Thailand Cultural Centre

title: Hot and breezy days with occasional showers in Pattaya as summer continues
desc: On a Pattaya baht bus, foreign visitors explore the city, making the most of every sunny or rainy moment. (Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – Tourists and locals in Pattaya are enjoying sunny mornings, but should stay prepared for brief afternoon thunderstorms, according to the Thai Meteorological Department. The upper part of Thailand remains under high heat pressure, while southeast winds carry moisture from the Gulf of Thailand, causing isolated showers in the region. For Pattaya and nearby Chonburi, there’s a 10% chance of thunderstorms, with daytime highs around 33–37°C and ove
desc_original: On a Pattaya baht bus, foreign visitors explore the city, making the most of every sunny or rainy moment. (Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – Tourists and locals in Pattaya are enjoying sunny mornings, but should stay prepared for brief afternoon thunderstorms, according to the Thai Meteorological Department. The upper part of Thailand remains under high heat pressure, while southeast winds carry moisture from the Gulf of Thailand, causing isolated showers in the region. For Pattaya and nearby Chonburi, there’s a 10% chance of thunderstorms, with daytime highs around 33–37°C and ove
title_cn: 芭提雅进入热季持续高温，午后偶有局部雷阵雨
summary_cn: 根据泰国气象部门预报，芭提雅（Pattaya）及春武里（Chonburi）地区正经历持续热浪，日间温度高达33-37°C。受来自泰国湾的东南季风水汽影响，该地区午后有大约10%的降雨概率，多为短时雷阵雨。目前芭提雅游客量依然稳定，大家在乘坐双条车游览时需注意防晒，并随身备好雨具以应对突发阵雨。

title: Tourism groups eye B15bn stimulus
desc: Seven tourism associations under the Federation of Thai Tourism Associations (Fetta) have called for stimulus projects worth a combined 15 billion baht, including cash handouts to local tourists, to prevent an industry downturn due to the Gulf war.
desc_original: Seven tourism associations under the Federation of Thai Tourism Associations (Fetta) have called for stimulus projects worth a combined 15 billion baht, including cash handouts to local tourists, to prevent an industry downturn due to the Gulf war.
title_cn: 泰七大旅游协会呼吁政府拨付150亿泰铢提振旅游业
summary_cn: 泰国旅游联合会（Fetta）旗下的七个主要协会已向政府递交申请，呼吁实施总价值约150亿泰铢的经济刺激计划。该提案旨在对抗中东地缘政局对全球旅游市场的冲击，具体措施包括向国内游客发放现金补贴等，以防旅游业陷入衰退。此举若获批，将对提振泰国国内及国际旅游市场信心起到关键作用。

title: 泰铢挺进32.49大关：受美元走软与局势缓和推动
desc_original: The Thai baht strengthened to around 32.49 per US dollar in early trading, supported by a weaker dollar and easing concerns over geopolitical tensions, while markets continue to monitor Thailand’s export outlook and global economic developments. PATTAYA, Thailand – The Thai baht strengthened to 32.49 per US dollar in early trading on Friday, gaining from the previous close of 32.82, as the US dollar weakened amid easing concerns over tensions in the Middle East. Krungthai Bank currency strategist
summary_cn: 随着中东地缘政治紧张局势的缓解以及美元指数持续走弱，泰铢对美元汇率本周五大幅回升，从之前的32.82反弹至32.49附近。泰京银行（Krungthai Bank）货币策略师Poon Panichpibool表示，尽管市场仍在关注泰国出口前景，但目前的涨势主要受美元回调支撑。泰铢走强有利于降低进口成本，但也可能对泰国出口商造成汇率变动压力。
title_cn: 泰铢挺进32.49大关：受美元走软与局势缓和推动

title: 燃油短缺危机：素万那普机场（Suvarnabhumi）出租车运力减半
desc_original: A fuel shortage is severely disrupting taxi services at Suvarnabhumi Airport, with large SUV taxis gradually suspending operations and only about 2,500 vehicles currently in active service, out of a fleet estimated at more than 5,000, operators say.
summary_cn: 受燃油短缺影响，曼谷素万那普机场（Suvarnabhumi Airport）的出租车服务面临严重短缺。目前，机场原本超过5000辆规模的出租车队伍中，仅剩下约2500辆仍在运行，大半车辆因燃油匮乏已停运，特别是大型SUV车型出租车受阻最为严重。运营商警告称，这可能导致旅客排队时间大幅增加，影响机场整体运输能力。
title_cn: 燃油短缺危机：素万那普机场（Suvarnabhumi）出租车运力减半

title: 为平抑电价，美莫（Mae Moh）两座燃煤机组重新启用
desc_original: The Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC) has ordered the restart of two decommissioned units at the Mae Moh coal-fired power plant in a bid to contain rising electricity bills.
summary_cn: 为应对不断攀升的居民电费压力，泰国能源监管委员会（ERC）已正式下令重启位于南邦府的美莫（Mae Moh）燃煤电厂中两座已退役的机组。此举旨在通过成本较低的煤炭发电来对冲昂贵的天然气进口支出，通过调整发电结构来抑制电费上涨趋势，以缓解民众生活成本压力。
title_cn: 为平抑电价，美莫（Mae Moh）两座燃煤机组重新启用

title: 中东冲突升级：泰国今年GDP增长或难保2%
desc_original: The Bank of Thailand is warning the war in the Middle East could weigh on Thailand's economy across multiple fronts, potentially dragging GDP growth below its 2% forecast for this year.
summary_cn: 泰国央行（Bank of Thailand）发出预警，由于中东冲突持续蔓延，泰国经济正面临多重冲击。地缘政治的不确定性将通过影响油价成本、贸易物流及出口需求等方面打击泰国复苏，今年国内生产总值（GDP）的增长预期很可能会跌破之前预测的2%基准线，宏观经济前景不容乐观。
title_cn: 中东冲突升级：泰国今年GDP增长或难保2%

title: 只要有油就行！是拉差（Sri Racha）加油站排队长龙逾1公里
desc_original: Motorists line up for more than a kilometer to refill their tanks at a Thai Oil fuel station in Sri Racha, Chonburi, after word spread that the station was allowing fuel purchases without strict limits.
summary_cn: 在春武里府的是拉差（Sri Racha）地区，由于燃油短缺传闻蔓延，当地一家泰石油（Thai Oil）加油站出现了超过1公里的排队车龙。车主们表示，在供应极度紧张的情况下，价格已经不再是重点，只要加油站不限制购买数量，无论排队多久都要加满油箱。此现象反映了当地近期能源供应的不安情绪。
title_cn: 只要有油就行！是拉差（Sri Racha）加油站排队长龙逾1公里

title: 野象闯入北柳府（Chachoengsao）居民厨房抢食大米
desc: CHACHOENGSAO — 19 March 2026, A wild elephant broke into a rural home in eastern Thailand overnight, rummaging through a kitchen and eating stored rice, officials said on Friday.
desc_original: CHACHOENGSAO — 19 March 2026, A wild elephant broke into a rural home in eastern Thailand overnight, rummaging through a kitchen and eating stored rice, officials said on Friday.
title_cn: 野象闯入北柳府（Chachoengsao）居民厨房抢食大米
summary_cn: 3月19日夜间，泰国东部北柳府（Chachoengsao）发生一起野象闯入民宅事件。一头饥饿的野象强行破坏了一户农村家庭的厨房，翻找并吃掉了储存的大米。当地官员确认该事件未造成人员伤亡。近年来随着森林栖息地减少，泰国野象进入人类居住区觅食的冲突事件频发，引发社会对人象冲突解决机制的关注。

title: 汉莎航空（Lufthansa）高管访问芭提雅 HHN 基金会，支持青少年发展计划
desc: Executives from Lufthansa Group visit children at the HHN Foundation for Thai Children in Central Pattaya, sharing a special lunch and activities that brought smiles to the youngsters. PATTAYA, Thailand – Senior executives from Lufthansa Group visited children under the care of the HHN Foundation for Thai Children in Central Pattaya on March 17, bringing smiles and support while reinforcing the company’s commitment to youth development initiatives in the local community. The delegation was led by Felipe Bonifatti, Vice President Asia Pacific, Middle East & Joint Ventures East of Lufthansa
desc_original: Executives from Lufthansa Group visit children at the HHN Foundation for Thai Children in Central Pattaya, sharing a special lunch and activities that brought smiles to the youngsters. PATTAYA, Thailand – Senior executives from Lufthansa Group visited children under the care of the HHN Foundation for Thai Children in Central Pattaya on March 17, bringing smiles and support while reinforcing the company’s commitment to youth development initiatives in the local community. The delegation was led by Felipe Bonifatti, Vice President Asia Pacific, Middle East & Joint Ventures East of Lufthansa
title_cn: 汉莎航空（Lufthansa）高管访问芭提雅 HHN 基金会，支持青少年发展计划
summary_cn: 3月17日，汉莎航空集团（Lufthansa Group）高管团队访问了位于芭提雅（Pattaya）中部的 HHN 泰国儿童基金会。由亚太、中东及东部合资副总裁 Felipe Bonifatti 带队的代表团为孩子们准备了特别午餐并开展互动，旨在履行企业社会责任，支持当地青少年发展项目，强化公司对社区福祉的长期承诺。

title: 油价飙升迫使泰国各地捕鱼船队停产返航
desc: Fishing fleets nationwide are halting operations as surging fuel prices and shortages push costs beyond sustainable levels.
desc_original: Fishing fleets nationwide are halting operations as surging fuel prices and shortages push costs beyond sustainable levels.
title_cn: 油价飙升迫使泰国各地捕鱼船队停产返航
summary_cn: 由于燃料价格持续飙升及能源供应短缺，泰国全国范围内的捕鱼船队正面临严重的经营危机。多地渔民表示，燃油成本已远远超过收益，导致捕鱼作业无法维持。目前大量渔船已被迫泊港停运。这一现象可能导致近期海鲜价格上涨，并预示着泰国渔业正承受巨大的成本压力，急需政府出台相关补贴或调控政策。

title: 芭提雅步行街（Walking Street）两伙变性人因手机纠纷爆发冲突，引游客围观
desc: Two groups of transgender individuals confront each other near the entrance of Walking Street Pattaya early on March 20 over a dispute involving a missing mobile phone.
desc_original: Two groups of transgender individuals confront each other near the entrance of Walking Street Pattaya early on March 20 over a dispute involving a missing mobile phone.
title_cn: 芭提雅步行街（Walking Street）两伙变性人因手机纠纷爆发冲突，引游客围观
summary_cn: 3月20日凌晨，芭提雅著名景点步行街（Walking Street）入口处发生激烈的肢体与言语冲突。两伙变性人群体因一起手机丢失纠纷互相指责并当众对战。由于时值旅游黄金时间，该事件吸引了大量游客围观驻足。虽然当地治安人员随后介入调停，但此类事件对该地区的旅游安全形象产生了一定负面影响。

title: 芭提雅男子因随地小便问题遭殴打，引发网络社会公德讨论
desc: A street confrontation in the tourist city of Pattaya has triggered a heated debate online after a viral video showed a man punching another man over alleged public urination.
desc_original: A street confrontation in the tourist city of Pattaya has triggered a heated debate online after a viral video showed a man punching another man over alleged public urination.
title_cn: 芭提雅男子因随地小便问题遭殴打，引发网络社会公德讨论
summary_cn: 近日，芭提雅（Pattaya）街头一则暴力视频在网络公开。视频显示一名男子因指责另一人涉嫌在此公共区域随地小便而发生了言语冲突，冲突随后升级，前者出手殴打后者。该事件引发了泰国网友对公共卫生公德心的关注，同时也呼吁市民在处理矛盾时应通过法律手段而非暴力。

title_cn: 普吉芭东（Patong）爆出暴力抢劫案，外籍游客遭恐吓抢现金
desc_original: PHUKET — 21 March 2026, A CCTV clip showing a foreign tourist being threatened and assaulted before having his cash stolen in Patong has been widely shared.
summary_cn: 2026年3月21日，一段监控视频在泰国社交媒体热传。视频显示，在普吉岛著名景区芭东（Patong），一名外籍游客遭到歹徒的恐吓与肢体袭击，随后身上的现金被抢走。此事件引发了公众对比、芭东地区旅游治安问题的担忧，目前当地警方已介入调查。提醒在普吉游客夜间出行注意安全，尽量避开僻静路段。

title_cn: 泰国发布气象预警，全国40省将迎来强雷雨及冰雹天气
desc_original: Thailand’s Meteorological Department has warned of severe weather tomorrow, with thunderstorms, hail, and strong winds forecast across 40 provinces.
summary_cn: 泰国气象局发布紧急天气预警，预计明日全国范围内共40个省份将面临严峻天气考验。预报显示，受热带气旋影响，上述地区将出现雷暴、强风，部分地区甚至可能伴有冰雹袭击。民众需警惕大风导致的大树倒塌和建筑物受损。在泰居民及游客请密切关注天气变化，减少户外活动，提前加固临时建筑。

title_cn: 泰国两名僧侣涉嫌性侵七名小沙弥被捕
desc_original: Police arrested two monks for allegedly raping seven novices and filming the abuse after luring the victims to their quarters.
summary_cn: 泰国警方近日采取行动，逮捕了两名僧侣。据指控，这两名僧侣合谋将七名年幼的小沙弥诱骗至僧舍生活区并实施性侵，甚至在施暴过程中拍摄视频。此案社会影响极其恶劣，涉及未成年人受害及宗教神职人员犯罪，目前嫌疑人已被警方控制，案件正在深度审理中。该事件再次引发泰国社会对僧侣行为规范监管的讨论。

title_cn: 曼谷石龙军路（Charoen Krung）名寺曝丑闻：两僧侣涉性虐被捕
desc_original: Two monks have been arrested at a well-known temple in the Charoen Krung area of Bangkok on charges of sexual abusing novice monks, with seven victims identified and over 100 explicit video clips seized as evidence.
summary_cn: 曼谷石龙军路（Charoen Krung）的一家著名寺庙爆出严重丑闻。警方根据线报逮捕了两名涉嫌性虐待小沙弥的僧侣。目前已确认有7名受害者。警方在搜查过程中没收了超过100段淫秽视频片段作为呈堂证供。该事件震动曼谷佛教界，寺庙方面正配合警方进行后续调查。由于涉及知名地点，此案引发了市民的高度关注。

title_cn: 泰南陶公府（Narathiwat）议员回乡途中遭伏击，虽幸免于难但致两伤
desc_original: NARATHIWAT - Prachachat Party MP Kamonsak Leewamoh narrowly escaped an attack by gunmen as he was returning to his home in Bacho district in the early hours of Friday.
summary_cn: 在泰国南部的陶公府（Narathiwat），国家党（Prachachat Party）国会议员 Kamonsak Leewamoh 在返家途中遭遇枪手伏击。袭击发生在周五凌晨，地点位于巴卓县（Bacho）。尽管议员本人在袭击中幸免于难，但随行人员中有两人受伤。陶公府长期以来存在局势动荡风险，此次针对政治人物的袭击再次给泰南边境地区的治安局势蒙上了阴影。

title: 中东局势引发能源担忧，泰国三家大医院限制门诊配药
desc: Three major hospitals have adjusted outpatient drug dispensing as a precaution to prevent potential shortages amid energy-related disruptions linked to the Middle East crisis.
desc_original: Three major hospitals have adjusted outpatient drug dispensing as a precaution to prevent potential shortages amid energy-related disruptions linked to the Middle East crisis.
title_cn: 泰国三家大型医院受中东危机引发的能源中断影响，宣布限制门诊配药
summary_cn: 受中东危机（Middle East crisis）引发的能源相关供应链中断影响，泰国三家主流大型医院已调整门诊配药政策。此举属于预防性措施，旨在防止未来可能出现的药品短缺。在该措施下，门诊病人的单次领药量或受到限制。建议在泰长期服药的外籍人士及本地患者密切关注所属医院的通知，并提前做好用药规划。

title: Chinese man blacklisted for filing fake theft to Chiang Mai police
desc: A Chinese man is suspected of filing a fake theft complaint in Chiang Mai in an attempt to obtain a police document for an insurance claim before leaving Thailand.
desc_original: A Chinese man is suspected of filing a fake theft complaint in Chiang Mai in an attempt to obtain a police document for an insurance claim before leaving Thailand.
title_cn: 一名男子在清迈（Chiang Mai）报假警骗保，已被列入离境黑名单
summary_cn: 一名中国籍男子涉嫌在清迈（Chiang Mai）向警方报假案，谎称财物被盗，意图在离开泰国前通过获取警方报案证明来申领报销保险。警方调查发现其供词疑点重重，目前该男子面临虚假陈述控告，并已被列入移民局黑名单。泰国警方提醒游客，报假警不仅浪费公共资源且触犯刑法，可能导致被捕、被禁止再次入境。

title: Love in time of censorship
desc: Women negotiate with China's repression of queer romance through consumption of Thai boys' love (BL), according to research by Xiaoping Wu.
desc_original: Women negotiate with China's repression of queer romance through consumption of Thai boys' love (BL), according to research by Xiaoping Wu.
title_cn: 学者研究：当代女性通过消费泰国BL剧（腐剧）应对情感表达限制
summary_cn: 学者 Xiaoping Wu 的研究发现，由于相关题材在本土受到管控，许多女性转而通过消费泰国的“男男纯爱（Boys' Love, BL）”文化产品来寻求情感代偿与表达。这一现象折射出泰国作为东南亚流行文化出口国的输出实力，以及中泰之间在流行文化、亚文化消费领域的深层互动。泰国BL剧已成为联结两国民间文化交流的重要纽带。

title: Living Beyond Boundaries in Paradise
desc: The mesmerizing Andaman Sea stretching endlessly and emerald green hills are the perfect backdrop for stepping into lifestyle-led luxury living at The Residences at InterContinental Phuket Resort.
desc_original: The mesmerizing Andaman Sea stretching endlessly and emerald green hills are the perfect backdrop for stepping into lifestyle-led luxury living at The Residences at InterContinental Phuket Resort.
title_cn: 普吉岛洲际度假酒店公寓（The Residences at InterContinental Phuket）打造安达曼海景豪宅
summary_cn: 普吉岛洲际度假酒店公寓（The Residences at InterContinental Phuket Resort）近期推介其生活方式导向的豪华居所。该项目背靠翡翠绿山，俯瞰无垠的安达曼海（Andaman Sea），主打极致自然景观与高端酒店配套服务相结合。此类高净值房产项目通常吸引国际投资者与高端旅居客群，反映出普吉岛顶级豪宅市场的稳健需求。

title: SRT Red Line Salaya–Nakhon Pathom extension mapped for 2033 opening
desc: Thailand’s State Railway of Thailand (SRT) is advancing plans for the Red Line Salaya–Nakhon Pathom extension, a 25.3-kilometre route with construction targets starting in 2026.
desc_original: Thailand’s State Railway of Thailand (SRT) is advancing plans for the Red Line Salaya–Nakhon Pathom extension, a 25.3-kilometre route with construction targets starting in 2026.
title_cn: 泰国国家铁路（SRT）红色线延伸段（萨拉亚 Salaya 至佛统府 Nakhon Pathom）预计2033年完工
summary_cn: 泰国国家铁路局（SRT）正在推进曼谷郊区铁路红色线（Red Line）的萨拉亚（Salaya）至佛统府（Nakhon Pathom）延伸段项目。该线路全长25.3公里，预计于2026年动工，2033年开放运营。这一重要基建项目将提升曼谷西部与相邻府治的通勤效率，预计会对沿线及起迄点周边的房产市场和商业开发产生长期利好影响。
